{{Quote|I'm not bad—just my master.|Baruk's RA-7|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
[[Reelo Baruk]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] who operated on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], owned a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]] '''[[RA-7 protocol droid/Legends|RA-7 protocol droid]]'''. While searching for Baruk, [[Kyle Katarn]] stumbled upon the droid, who assured him that he was not evil, just his master. The droid also told Katarn to watch out for Baruk and asked not to be deactivated.

==Behind the scenes==
The droid is canonical, appearing in [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast|''Jedi Outcast'']], but has never been named. If the player approaches the droid, it will exchange some dialogue with Katarn. The player can choose to destroy the droid, but this does not affect the game in any way. There is another RA-7 protocol droid at [[Baruk's Bar]] in one of the two secret areas inside the bar, he says the same lines.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
